title: Forever Server
body:
A modpack made for our Forever server.

Contains a number of mods to enhance the experience and integrate with the additions to the server. However, the server can be joined with a Vanilla client, so you are free to do away with these mods or pick and choose from the them!
Of all the mods in the pack, these I believe are the most essential:
- Simple Voice Chat
- Armor Poser
- Item Model Browser
- Entity Texture Features
- Entity Model Features

This modpack contains these mods(Not including Libraries/APIs):
- Simple Voice Chat
- Armor Poser
- Axiom
- FerriteCore
- Lithium
- No Chat Reports
- Status
- ItemSwapper
- Bundles Beyond
- Peek
- Chat Signing Hider
- Server Resourcepack Checker
- Locator Heads
- Item Model Browser
- Chat Heads
- Scribble
- Better Block Entities
- Big Sign Writer
- Mod Menu
- Sodium
- Iris
- Entity Texture Features
- Entity Model Features
- AppleSkin
- Continuity
- Sound Physics Remastered
- LambDynamicLights
- MoreChatHistory
